name: options-panel
title: Options Panel
description: Anchored popover shell with header, body, and footer slots for custom controls. Footer owns gapX and gapY, with FooterActions and FooterMeta for paired actions and status copy. Prefer this over Popover when the surface needs composed controls.

api.description: Anchored popover shell with a titled header and open body/footer slots for custom controls such as inputs, buttons, and sections. Prefer this over Popover when the surface needs composed controls. Width hugs content up to the panel max-width token and the viewport. Shares Popover dismiss behavior: Escape and outside clicks close, and focus returns to the trigger.

groups.title: OptionsPanel
groups.description: Root open state. Same API as Popover.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when open state changes.

props.name: render
props.description: Host element that toggles the panel.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger content when not using render.

groups.title: OptionsPanelContent
groups.description: Panel shell. Sizes to content, capped by --df-options-panel-max-width and the viewport. Defaults to end align and bottom side.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred placement side. Flips when there is not enough space.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment along the side. auto picks the best fit from available space (content-aware).

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap between trigger and panel.

props.name: matchTriggerWidth
props.description: Lock the panel to the trigger width. Off by default so the panel sizes to its content within the max-width cap.

props.name: portal
props.description: When false, render the panel inline for docs demos. The body hugs content with no height clamp. Default portals to document.body and keeps the body max-height scroll contract.

props.name: className
props.description: Override or extend panel chrome. Use width or max-width utilities when a call site needs a different size than the token default.

props.name: children
props.description: Compose OptionsPanelHeader, OptionsPanelBody, and OptionsPanelFooter.

groups.title: Header, body, and footer slots
groups.description: Pure layout regions. Put any controls in body; any actions or meta in footer.

props.name: OptionsPanelHeader
props.description: Header region with bottom border. Usually wraps the title.

props.name: OptionsPanelTitle
props.description: Panel title text.

props.name: OptionsPanelBody
props.description: Body slot. Hugs content width. Portaled panels clamp height with --df-options-panel-max-height and scroll when content is taller. Set fit to size to content with no scroll clamp. Inline panels (portal false) also size to content with no scroll clamp.

props.name: fit
props.description: OptionsPanelBody prop. Size the body to its content with no max-height scroll clamp. Default keeps the portaled height cap and vertical scroll.

props.name: OptionsPanelFooter
props.description: Footer slot with top border. Compose OptionsPanelFooterActions and OptionsPanelFooterMeta. Owns gapX and gapY.

groups.title: OptionsPanelFooter
groups.description: Footer region for actions and meta. Column layout by default. gapY spaces stacked rows. gapX feeds FooterActions and FooterMeta.

props.name: gap
props.description: Sets both gapX and gapY. Prefer spacing tokens such as calc(2 * var(--spacing-unit)). Overridden by gapX or gapY when those are set.

props.name: gapX
props.description: Horizontal gap for FooterActions and FooterMeta. Sets --df-options-panel-footer-gap-x.

props.name: gapY
props.description: Vertical gap between stacked footer rows such as actions and meta. Sets --df-options-panel-footer-gap-y.

props.name: children
props.description: Prefer OptionsPanelFooterActions for the two-up action row and OptionsPanelFooterMeta for status copy with Badge.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the footer region.

groups.title: Footer actions and meta
groups.description: Named footer parts that consume --df-options-panel-footer-gap-x. Keep custom single-action footers as direct Footer children.

props.name: OptionsPanelFooterActions
props.description: Two-column action row for paired controls such as Download and Copy. Gap comes from the parent footer gapX.

props.name: OptionsPanelFooterMeta
props.description: Centered meta row for export summary copy and kit Badge. Uses text-xs muted foreground by default. Gap comes from the parent footer gapX.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-options-panel-max-width
props.description: Maximum panel width before content wraps. Combined with a viewport clamp on the shell.

props.name: --df-options-panel-max-height
props.description: Maximum panel height before scrolling.

props.name: --df-options-panel-footer-gap-x
props.description: Horizontal gap for FooterActions and FooterMeta. Set by gap or gapX.

props.name: --df-options-panel-footer-gap-y
props.description: Vertical gap between stacked footer rows. Set by gap or gapY.

props.name: --popover
props.description: Panel fill.

props.name: --popover-foreground
props.description: Panel text color.
